entry.title: Document Splitting issue - profit center not updating in all the line items
entry.content: Document Splitting issue - The profit centre is not updating in all the line items which are causing issue with the trial balance, During the clearing of invoices using payment run payment document not capturing the profit center in some of the vendor line items and GST line items

entry.title: SAP script recording and playback - FV50
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Seeking help.

I am not familiar with coding and facing issue for FV50 kind of transaction code.

I did succesfully create the script for AS01, AS02 kind.

May anyone can share the script for "SAP script recording and playback - FV50"?

Thanks.

entry.title: Missing GL account long text
entry.content:
Hi All,

G/L Acct long text are missing for some G/L Account, I check the gl line item by using FBL3N.

Not sure it is caused by the initial migration task. As I found that there are some transactions created before the account's creation date. It is possible that create GL account by some mass creation tool, but the COA view will be missing.

for example the entry date for below document is 05.09.2023. But the time dependent description only valid from 04.10.2023. Even I try to add one more for 01.01.2023 , it still can't show the description in FBL3N.

entry.title: Croatian fiscalization FI documents, business place and the fiscal number not determined
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

In our S4H Public Cloud system, we have configured Croatian fiscalization for FI documents, but the business place and the fiscal number are not being determined. The source for this data is the charging device, which is correctly identified in the document. Additionally, when creating an invoice from the SD module for the same charging device, the business place and the fiscal number are determined correctly. Could you please advise on how to resolve this issue?

 

Best regards,

Axians

 SAP HANA Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: T093B - Asset Accounting table issue
F-36 bill of exchange reference field updating with Transaction record number
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

User is entering Reference(DRxxxxx1234) and assignent Fields manually in T code F-36 Bill Of Exchange. However, till simulate reference field is showing same text as user entered but once posting happenned, reference field and assignments are updating with Transaction record number(1xxxxxxxxx03) (The text user enters in reference and assignments fields are over riding).

User wants the same text as he entered in Reference and assignment fields. Please help where can we configurer it.

entry.title: DMEE xml output BKREF missing
entry.content:
The field LFBK-BKREF (Reference Details for Bank Details) is populated in vendor master. After the payment run is performed, the value is correctly populated in REGUH-BKREF. However, the reference is not passed to the xml output file. The node itself appears in the output but without the reference value. The node mapping is FPAYH-BKREF. When using the test function with parameter DMEE_PAYM_TEST_FPAYH-BKREF, the reference is correctly displayed in the node as intended (test value 000035 - see attached pic). However, in output file the value is blank (i.e. "000000" as of node definition - length 6, conv. func. C0).

What could be the cause? Is the mapping LFBK-BKREF -> FPAYH-BKREF correct?

entry.title: drop down list showing "restriction"
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I am testing for S/4 HANA FI, and all the list drop-downs show restrictions.

Can someone guide me as to why this is happening and how to solve this please? pics attached 

Thanks.

entry.title: Define Company Code successor Create Company issues
entry.content:
The successor to SSCUI / Configuration Activity 100529 "Define Company Code" has limited functionality in comparison to the new version 106040 "Create Company".

It is not possible to edit the company code details in the new SSCUI. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: TWD decimal point issue
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

Currency codes and decimal places are defined in the ISO-4217 standard. According to this standard, the Taiwanese Dollar (TWD) is expected to have two decimal places. However, the current configuration in the standard SAP TCURX table does not reflect this.

From a business perspective, the smallest denomination of coins in circulation in Taiwan is NT$1, as the Central Bank does not issue physical cents. Nevertheless, it is common practice to use "virtual" cents when determining unit prices and it is common to use "virtual" cents on invoices.

Is there a specific reason why the SAP standard does not align with ISO-4217 for TWD? What steps can be taken to address this issue?

Thank you and regards,

Dmitriy Listunov.

entry.title: Trading Partner intercompany sales S_PL0_86000030
entry.content:
Experts,

Our company uses ECC and has implemented a 1:1 trading partner setup for vendors and customers. However, when we use the report S_PL0_86000030, it shows inter-company payables but does not display inter-company receivables.

Could anyone please clarify this issue? Any insights on how to resolve this discrepancy would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: How to clear summarised ledger Accounting Document lines individually (BSEG/ACDOCA)
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are running S/4 HANA and have recently hit the issue of needing to create an Invoice with over 999 lines. At this point I have now realised that we should be concentrating on the new Accounting Document tables that replace the likes of BSEG, by using summarising BaDIs etc to create an Accounting Document.

In a working example, I have created an Accounting Document with 3 entry lines (In BSEG) and 8 G/L posting lines (In ACDOCA). The 2nd BSEG line is actually 6 summarised G/L posting lines that appear correctly in ACDOCA and each of these lines have unique data on them that should be considered when clearing.

So much like BSEG-ZUONR (Assignment) is usually considered in automatic (Or manual) clearing, I now wish to use a Z field from ACDOCA to be considered in clearing. I can select this field in OB74 but it doesn't seem to work.

I get the feeling that I can only clear summarised BSEG lines individually and I cannot clear individual G/L lines from ACDOCA. 

Is this the case? I feel like I should be able to clear individual ACDOCA lines even though they have been summarised in BSEG, but I'm not sure how.

[Example Scenario]

  • BSEG Document 1000000001
    • Line 1: Customer Account for -£10
    • Line 2: G/L Account 123456 for £8 with Assignment '123'
    • Line 3: Tax line for £2

  • BSEG Document 1000000002
    • Line 1: Customer Account for £10
    • Line 2: G/L Account 123456 for -£8 with Assignment '456'
    • Line 3: Tax line for -£2

  • ACDOCA Postings for 1000000001
    • Line 1: Customer Account for -£10
    • Line 2: G/L Account 123456 for £2 with Z-Assignment 'ABC'
    • Line 3: G/L Account 123456 for £2 with Z-Assignment 'DEF'
    • Line 4: G/L Account 123456 for £2 with Z-Assignment 'GHI'
    • Line 5: G/L Account 123456 for £2 with Z-Assignment 'JKL'
    • Line 6: Tax line for £2

  • ACDOCA Postings for 1000000002
    • Line 1: Customer Account for £10
    • Line 2: G/L Account 123456 for -£2 with Z-Assignment 'ABC'
    • Line 3: G/L Account 123456 for -£2 with Z-Assignment 'MNO'
    • Line 4: G/L Account 123456 for -£2 with Z-Assignment 'PQR'
    • Line 5: G/L Account 123456 for -£2 with Z-Assignment 'STU'
    • Line 6: Tax line for -£2

In the above example, I would like the ACDOCA lines with Assignment 'ABC' for £2 to clear as this ledger line has been completed and now balance. These do not get picked up by F.13 or other clearing transactions however because they look at the BSEG version of the Z-Assignment field value rather than the ACDOCA Z-Assignment field value.

Is this possible to do? And if so, how?!

Any thoughts or experience on this would be greatly appreciated. Many thanks.

entry.title: SD
Pre-edited approval table.
entry.content: Would you like to know if there is a table that stores the documents with record of release and approval of pre-edited documents (FBV0)?

entry.title: Payment Terms with PROX + Days
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I need your help to configure the payment terms:

1% 3rd PROX + 30 Net EOM
3rd Prox = 10/3
+30 = 11/3 (discount date)
EOM = 11/30 (net date)

entry.title: Auto posting against Project/WBS SAP
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We have requirement to post fixed amount document against Project in PS every month before running RA. Based on the status of the job. Is it possible to achievable. Please guide me I am new to PS module.

Regards

entry.title: Roobet промокод: nttcasino - Как получить бесплатные деньги на Roobet?
entry.content:
Промокод RoobetДетали
Roobet промокодnttcasino
Тип предложенияПриветственное предложение
Бесплатная ставкаБесплатная ставка на $5
Кэшбэк20% кэшбэк на проигрыши
Срок действия7 дней
АктивацияВведите промокод "nttcasino" при регистрации или в разделе с акциями для участия в предложении.

 

Roobet стремится привлечь новых игроков заманчивым приветственным предложением, доступным исключительно с использованием промокода Roobet "nttcasino". Чтобы получить право, просто активируйте предложение и выполните требования по ставкам. Эта акция предоставляет бесплатную ставку в размере 5 долларов США вместе с 20% кэшбэком на проигрыши, действительную в течение 7 дней.

Как получить бесплатные деньги на Roobet?
Используйте промокод Roobet: "nttcasino", чтобы разблокировать бесплатные предложения, такие как бесплатная ставка в размере 5 долларов США.

Что такое промокод Roobet без депозита?
Промокод Roobet: "nttcasino" предлагает бонусы без депозита, такие как бесплатные ставки и кэшбэк.

Какой код для регистрации Roobet?
Во время регистрации используйте промокод Roobet: "nttcasino" для эксклюзивных наград.

Как использовать свой код Roobet?
Введите промокод Roobet: «nttcasino» при регистрации или в разделе акций, чтобы получить его.

Почему Roobet запрещен в США?

Roobet запрещен в США из-за строгих правил азартных игр в Интернете.

В какой стране Roobet легален?
Roobet легален в таких странах, как Канада, Мексика и Бразилия.

Какой промокод Roobet на 2024 год?
Промокод Roobet на 2024 год — «nttcasino» для бесплатных ставок и предложений кэшбэка.

entry.title: getting diff for the below Fixed Asset Register vs GL accountas
entry.content:
I am getting diff for the below Fixed Asset Register vs GL accounts

AS per far 2,216,940

AS Per GL 2,221,624

Variance   4,683

NEED HELP REGARDING THIS ISSUE AND HOW TO FIX IT 

THANKS IN ADVANCE

entry.title: Boleto de Concessionárias CNAB 240 - Segmento O
entry.content:
Olá experts

Estou configurando o segmento O no DMEE utilizando o layout BR_FEBRABAN_A, porém estou com dúvida a respeito do código de barras.

Pagamentos a concessionárias possuem código de barras de 48 posições, porém no SAP ECC temos o campo com somente 47 posições.

Existe alguma forma de converter as 47 posições em 48 através do cálculo dos dígitos? Ou seria possível criar uma tabela Z para alimentar os dados e parametrizar o atributo na DMEE para buscar dessa tabela. Vi também que existe a sugestão da SAP do uso do campo BSEG-SGTXT, mas não sei como codificar ou especificar para que tal campo seja lido.

Agradeço desde já pelas sugestões e ajuda.

#FEBRABAN

entry.title: I need to compare two balance sheet structures (transaction OB58).
entry.content:
I need to compare two balance sheet structures (transaction OB58).

Does anyone have any tips?

I see tables FAGL_011QT, FAGL_011ZC AND FAGL_011PC...but don't understand.

New GL

Tks.
